Name: Pump Action
Description: Cone: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 60 degree 7 metre in front of you. Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A cone attack that deals 27 physical damage

Name: Sawed Off
Description: "Pump Action" will also cause affected targets to become Weakened by a single stack of the Debilitated effect, which reduces all damage dealt by 3% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 10 times

Name: Out for a Kill
Description: Consumes all Shotgun Resources. A single target attack that deals 91 - 179 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed. Enermies who are killed shortly after being hit will grant you a beneficial effect for 8 seconds which increases the Penetration Chance of your attacks from manifestations, turrets, mines or drones by 10%

Name: Dead on Target
Description: Increases direct damage dealt by Shotgun abilities by 10%

Name: Buckshot
Description: A single target attack that deals 125 physical damage, or 137 physical damage if you have 5 Shotgun resources on the target

Name: Rapid Reload
Description: Reduces the activation time of "Buckshot" by 0.5 seconds.

Name: Kneecapper
Description: Cone: Affects up to 10 enemies in a 60 degree 9 metre cone in front of you. A cone attack that deals 348 physical damage. Affected targets also become Hindered and their movement speed is reduced by 70% for 8 seconds.

Name: Hit & Run
Description: Whenever an enemy dies with your Shotgun Resources remaining, an explosion occurs around that enemy, dealing 35 physical damage up to 6 enemies in a 3 metre radius

Name: Powder Burn
Description: Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A single target Strike attack that deals 49 physical damage, or 56 physical damage if the target is Hindered

Name: Gunsmoke
Description: Whenever you apply Weakened, the target takes 7 physical damage

Name: Breaching Shot
Description: Gives all group members a beneficial effect that increases Pentration Chance by 45% for 8 seconds. Affected group members also gain the "Depleted" effect which prevents them from gaining the "Breaching Shot" effect for 90 seconds. This ability does not trigger and is not affected by global recharge time.

Name: Breach Party
Description: Reduces the recharge time of "Breaching Shot" by 30 seconds and reduces the duration of "Depleted" effect by 30 seconds.

Name: Both Barrels
Description: Cone: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 60 degree 7 metre cone in front of you. Consumes all Shotgun Resources. A cone Blast attack that deals 50 - 99 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Authority
Description: Your group-wide effects are 20% more effective.

Name: Fire and Forget
Description: Column: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 4 metre wide by 10 metre long area in front of you. Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A column Blast attack that deals 27 physical damage.

Name: 12 Gouge
Description: Whenever you penetrate, your target becomes Weakened by a single stack of the Debilitated effect, which reduces all damage dealt by 3% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

Name: Riot Act
Description: TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the target. Consumes all Shotgun Resources. A TAoE attack that deals 45 - 90 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Riot Control
Description: "Riot Act" also leaves a ground area lasting 5 seconds that reduces the movement speed of enemies inside it by 15%.

Name: Stopping Power
Description: Cone: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 7 metre long 60 degree cone in front of you. Consumes all Shotgun Resources. A cone attack that deals 50 - 99 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed. This attack will penetrate any targets that are Hindered.

Name: Blast Corps
Description: Blast abilities also apply a detrimental effect which makes the target take X physical damage the next time they are hit.

Name: Shotgun Wedding
Description: Channelled: Every 0.5 seconds for 2.5 seconds. Cone: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 9 metre long 60 degree cone in front of you. A channelled cone attack that deals 66 physical damage per hit. Each time the ability fires and hits any number of targets, the damage of the remaining hits is increased by 25%. This effect can stack up to 4 times. Applies Vulnerable to Magic.

Name: Beanbag Rounds
Description: Whenever you apply Hindered, you gain the Minor Penetration Chance effect, which increases your Penetration Chance by 15% for 8 seconds.

Name: Kickback
Description: Column Dash: Dash backward 10 metres, affecting up to 7 enemies in a 6 metre wide column along the way. A single target attack that deals 61 physical damage. Also performs a backward column dash attack that deals 34 physical damage.

Name: Pinned Down
Description: Whenever you penetrate, you also cause the target to become Hindered and its movement speed to be reduced by 70% for 4 seconds. This effect cannot happen more frequently than once every 30 seconds.

Name: Takedown
Description: A single target attack that deals 118 physical damage. The target becomes Hindered and its movement speed is reduced by 70% for 4 seconds. If you have 5 Shotgun Resources on the target, the movement reducing effect will last 2 seconds longer.

Name: Overpenetration
Description: Whenever you penetrate, you build a counter. Once you reach 3 counters, you gain the Minor Penetration Chance effect, which increases Penetration Chance by 15% for 8 seconds.

Name: Lock, Stock & Barrel
Description: Gives you a beneficial effect that causes your next Shotgun resource consumer within 20 seconds to build 5 Shotgun Resources at the end of activation.

Name: Close Quarters
Description: Whenever you hit a target that is within 3 metres of you, target becomes Hindered and its movement speed is reduced by 70% for 4 seconds.

Name: Single Barrel
Description: Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A single target attack that deals 47 physical damage, or 52 physical damage if the target is Weakened.

Name: Strike Force
Description: Increases the Penetration Chance of Strike attacks by 7.5%.

Name: Raging Bullet
Description: Consumes all Shotgun Resources. A single target Strike attack that deals 77 - 153 physical damage. If the target is between 3 and 9 metres from you it will instead deal 86 - 170 physical damage, or if the target is closer that 3 metres it will deal 92 - 182 physical damage. Damage scales based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Body Piercing
Description: Whenever you penetrate, you gain single stack of the Penetration Rating effect, which increases your Penetration Rating by 40 per stack for 8 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

Name: Heavy Recoil
Description: Consumes all Shotgun Resources. A single target attack that deals 77 - 165 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed. If the target is Weakened you also dash 10 metres backward, dealing 14 physical damage to up to 6 enemies in a 6 metre wide area on your way.

Name: Invasive Measures
Description: Whenever you hit a Weakened target, you have a 17.5% chance to build 1 resource for your primary weapon. If you already have the maximum available resources when this effect triggers, you will instead perform an additional hit dealing x physical damage to the target.

Name: Point Blank
Description: A single target attack that deals 348 physical damage and causes the target to be knocked 2 metres back. This ability has a 3 metre range. Applies Vulnerable to Melee. Susceptible to Anima Deviation.

Name: Scattershot
Description: TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the target. Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A TAoE attack that deals 24 physical damage.

Name: Collateral Damage
Description: Blast attacks have a 50% chance to purge 1 beneficial effect from the target.

Name: Shotgun Turret
Description: Consumes all Shotgun Resources. A Blast attack that places a turret at your feet. The turret will fire every seconds for 5 seconds, affecting up to 6 enemies in a 7 metre long 120 degree cone in front of you, dealing 14 - 28 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed. This ability has a 7 metre range.

Name: High-Gauge Turret
Description: Increases damage dealt by "Shotgun Turret" by 15%.

Name: Tear Gas
Description: TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around your target. Consumes all Shotgun Resources. A TAoE attack that deals 45 - 90 physical damage, or 50 - 99 physical damage to Hindered targets. Damage scales based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Mitigating Factor
Description: Whenever you penetrate or apply Hindered, you gain a single stack of the Protection effect, which increases your Physical and Magical Protection by 40 per stack for 8 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

Name: Cleanup
Description: Gives all group memebers a beneficial effect that lasts 9 seconds. While this effect is active, it cleanse 1 detrimental effect every 1.5 seconds. Their targets will be purged of 1 beneficial effect with each hit. This ability does not trigger and is not affected by global recharge time.

Name: Crap Shoot
Description: Whenever you hit a Weakened target there is a random chance to get one of three effects. Only one of the following effects can occur whenever you hit a target: ○ Seven Out: 16% chance to purge 1 beneficial effect. ○ Snake Eyes: 3% chance to hit the target for 21 physical damage. ○ Midnight: 3% chance to gain the Minor Penetration effect, which increases your Penetration Chance by 15% for 8 seconds.

Name: Smart Bomb
Description: Places a mine at the targeted point that lasts 60 seconds. If an enemy comes within 5 metres of the mine, it explodes dealing 60 physical damage to up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around it. Affected targets also have 2 beneficial effects purged from them.

Name: Hardcase
Description: Whenever you apply Weakened, you gain a single stack of the Protection effect, which increases your Physical and Magical Protection by 40 per stack for 8 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

Name: Flak Jacket
Description: Grants all group members a beneficial effect that reduces all damage received by 15% for 5 seconds. This ability does not trigger and is not affected by global recharge time.

Name: Full Flak Jacket
Description: Increases the duration of "Flak Jacket" by 5 seconds. Increases the damage reduction effect of "Flak Jacket" to 25%.

Name: Bomb Squad
Description: Places a mine at the targeted point that lasts 60 seconds. If an enemy comes within 5 metres of the mine, it explodes dealing 60 physical damage to up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around it. Affected targets also become Hindered and their movement speed is reduced by 70% for 8 seconds.

Name: Shield Formation
Description: Every 2 seconds you gain a single stack of the Protection effect, which increases your Physical and Magical Protection by 40 per stack for 8 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times. Also, whenever you gain Minor Ward, Major Ward or stacks of the Protection effect, all friends within 15 metres of you will receive the same effect. Reduces all incoming damage by 5%.

Name: Striker
Description: Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A single target Strike attack that deals 49 physical damage.

Name: Impact Striker
Description: Increases damage dealt by "Striker" to Hindered targets by 25%

Name: Defensive Turret
Description: Consumes all Shotgun Resources. Places a turret at your feet, lasting 10 seconds. Friends staying within a 5 metre radius of the turret gain a beneficial effect that reduces all damage recived by 3% per resource consumed.

Name: Punisher
Description: Strike attacks also cause the target to become Weakened by a single stack of the Debilitated effect, which reduces all damage dealt by 3% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

Name: Sure Shot
Description: Consumes all Shotgun Resources. A single target attack that deals 91 - 179 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed. If the target is Hindered, you also cleanse 1 detrimental effect from your defensice target and purge 1 beneficial effect from the target.

Name: Perjury
Description: Whenever you penetrate twice in a row or apply Hindered, you also cleanse 1 detrimental effect from yourself. Cleansing a detrimental effect from a penetrating hit has an internal recharge time of 3 seconds.

Name: Bombardment
Description: Places a turret at the targeted point. The turret will fire at a random enemy within 7 metres every 2.5 seconds for 20 seconds. Affected enemies are deals 75 physical damage and other enemies within 3 metres are dealt 25 physical damage.

Name: The Business
Description: Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A single target attack that hits 3 times, dealing 16 physical damage per hit.

Name: Magnum
Description: "The Business" also causes the target to become Weakened by single stack of the Corrupted effect, which reduces the effectiveness of heal, barrier and leech effects by 5% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

Name: Shootout
Description: Channelled: Every 0.5 seconds for 2.5 seconds. Consumes all Pistol Resources. A channelled Focus attack that deals 41 - 62 physical damage per hit, based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Coup de Grace
Description: Whenever an enemy dies with your Pistol Resources remaining, up to 6 friends in a 5 metre radius around that enemy are healed for Y.

Name: Drone Kit
Description: Consumes all Pistol Resources. Summons a drone that will follow you around for 20 seconds. Every 2 seconds it will fire at the closest enemy within 5 metres and deal 11 - 22 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Straight Shooter
Description: Increases direct damage dealt by Pistol abilities by 10%

Name: Dirty Tricks
Description: GTAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the targeted point. A GTAoE attack that deals 348 physical damage. Affected targets become Hindered and rooted to the ground for 4 seconds. Targets also become Weakened by 5 stacks of the Corrupted effect, which reduces the effectiveness of heal, barrier and leech effects by 5% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 10 times. Susceptible to Anima Deviation.

Name: Hothead
Description: Whenever you apply Hindered, you gain Minor Critical Chance effect, which increases your Critical Chance by 10% for 8 seconds.

Name: Above the Law
Description: Persistent GTAoE: Places an area effect that affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the targeted point every seconds for 10 seconds. Builds 2 resource for each equipped weapon on each target in the area when placed. A persistent GTAoE attack that creates an area on the ground dealing 7 physical damage, or 8 physical damage to targets that are Hindered.

Name: Vigilante
Description: Increases the damage of "Above the Law" by 10% and the duration by 5 seconds.

Name: Deadly Aim
Description: Gives all group members a beneficial effect that increases Critical Chance by 40% for 10 seconds. Affected group members also gain the "Uncalibrated" effect which prevents them from gaining the "Deadly Aim" effect for 90 seconds. This ability does not trigger and is not affected by global recharge time.

Name: Calling the Shots
Description: Reduces the recharge time of "Deadly Aim" by 30 seconds and reduces the duration of "Uncalibrated" effect by 30 seconds.

Name: Wanted
Description: Chain: Jumps up to 5 metres 5 times, hitting up to 6 enemies. Consumes all Pistol Resources. A Chain attack that deals 45 - 90 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Rapid Getaway
Description: Whenever you activate any resource consumer, you gain a beneficial effect that increased your movement speed by 15% for 5 seconds and you gain the Minor Critical Chance effect, which increases your Critical Chance by 10% for 8 seconds.

Name: Hair Trigger
Description: Channelled: Every 0.25 seconds for 1 second. Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A channelled Focus attack that deals 12 physical damage per hit

Name: Increased Focus
Description: Focus attacks have a 7.5% increased chance to critically hit.

Name: Start & Finish
Description: Consumes all Pistol Resources. A single  target attack that performs 2 hits. The first hit deals 23 physical damage. The second hit deals 63 - 146 physical damage, or 70 - 152 physical damage if the target is Weakened.

Name: Mad Skills
Description: Whenever you critically hit or heal, you gain a single stack of the Critically Rating effect, which increased your Critical Rating by 40 per stack for 8 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

Name: Big Forty Five
Description: Consumes all Pistol Resources. A single target attack that deals 133 - 229 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Quick Forty Five
Description: Reduces the activation time of "Big Forty Five" by 0.5 seconds.

Name: Gun Crazy
Description: Channelled: Every 0.3 seconds for 3 seconds. ○First 3 hits: 21 physical damage. ○Next 3 hits: 35 physical damage. ○Next 3 hits: 62 physical damage in a 5 metre area around the target. ○Final hit: 175 physical damage. Applies Vulnerable to Magic.

Name: Bad Break
Description: Whenever you hit a Hindered target, the target also becomes Weakened by 2 stacks of the Corrupted effect, which reduces the effectiveness of heal, barrier and leech effects by 5% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

Name: Shake and Bake
Description: Column Dash: Dash forward 10 metres, affecting up to 6 enemies in a 6 metre wide column along the way. A column dash attacl that deals 60 physical damage. Affected targets also become Hindered and rooted to the ground for 4 seconds.

Name: Fear and Wonder
Description: Whenever you critically hit, the target also becomes Weakened by 2 stacks of the Corrupted effect, which reduces the effectiveness of heal, barrier and leech effects by 5% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

Name: Gun-Fu
Description: PBAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 10 metre radius around you. Applies 5 Pistol Resources to each target. Reduces the recharge time of all Pistol resource consumers currently recharging by 4 seconds.

Name: One in the Chamber
Description: Whenever you critically hit, you also perform an additional hit dealing 28 physical damage to the target.

Name: Marked
Description: A single target attack that deals 165 physical damage. The target becomes Weakened by 5 stacks of Corrupted effect, which reduces the effectiveness of heal, barrier and leech effects by 5% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

Name: Seal the Deal
Description: Increases the damage and healing done by resource consuming abilities by 20% and also increases the critical and penetration chance of these abilities by 5%.

Name: Killer Flow
Description: PBAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around you. Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A PBAoE attack that deals 24 physical damage.

Name: Running Circles
Description: Whenever you critically hit, you gain a beneficial effect that increases your movement speed by 10% for 5 seconds. Whenever you hit a target when you are moving, you also perform an additional hit dealing x physical damage to the target.

Name: Semi-Auto
Description: Channelled: Every 0.4 seconds for 2 seconds. Chain: Jumps up to 5 metres 5 times, hitting up to 6 enemies. Consumes all Pistol Resources. A channelled Chain attack that deals 17 - 27 physical damage per hit, based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Chain Misery
Description: Whenever you hit with a Chain attack, the target also becomes Weakened by 1 stack of the Corrupted effect, which reduces the effectiveness of heal, barrier and leech effects by 5% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

Name: Set 'Em Up
Description: TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the target. Consumes all Pistol Resources. A TAoE attack that deals 47 - 92 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed. If any affected target is Hindered you gain 2 resources for your secondary weapon.

Name: Closer (ability)
Description: Increases the damage and healing done by resource consuming abilities by 10%.

Name: Bullet Ballet
Description: Channelled: Every 0.2 seconds for 2 seconds. PBAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 10 metre radius around you. Consumes all Pistol Resources. A channelled PBAoE attack 44 physical damage per hit. If you have pistol resources on a target the final hit of this attack deals an additional 21 - 110 physical damage to targets, based on the number of resources consumed. Also, whenever you hit, you gain a single stack of Critical Rating effect, which increases your Critical Rating by 40 per stack for 8 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times. While channelling you are rooted to the ground. Applies Vulnerable to Melee.

Name: Collaboration
Description: Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A single target attack that deals 47 physical damage. Cleanses you of 1 detrimental effect. This effect has an internal recharge time of 5 seconds.

Name: Ready For More
Description: Whenever you finish channelling a Focus ability, you also perform a PBAoE that cleanses 1 detrimental effect from up to 3 friends around you. This cannot happen more that once every 10 seconds.

Name: Bond, Strong Bond
Description: Channelled: Every 0.3 seconds for 3 seconds. Consumers all Pistol Resources. A channelled attack that deals 18 - 29 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed. At the end of the channel, cleanses 1 detrimental effect from up to 5 allies within 5 metres of you.

Name: Critical Help
Description: Whenever you summon a manifestation, turret, mine or drone, your group also gains 1 stack of the Critical Rating effect, which increases Critical Rating by 40 per stack for 8 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

Name: Area Drone
Description: Consumes all Pistol Resources. Summons a drone that will follow you around for 5 seconds. Every seconds it will attack up to 6 enemies around the target, dealing 16 - 31 physical damage, or 18 - 35 physical damage to targets that are Weakened. If the target dies before the drone is finished attacking it will deal 39 - 77 physical damage to targets within the same area. Damage scales based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Shot in the Arm
Description: Whenever you attempt to cleanse a detrimental effect, the target is also healed for Y and the recharge time of all movement abilities currently recharging is reduced by 1 seconds.

Name: Pistol Love
Description: Cleanses the defensive target of all detrimental effects. After cleansing, the target cannot be Weakened, Hindered or Impaired for 10 seconds, and gains a laser drone that attacks up to 6 enemies within 5 metres, dealing 79 physical damage every 2.5 seconds for 10 seconds.

Name: Exploitation
Description: Whenever you hit a Hindered target or critically hit, there is a 33% chance you also cleanse 1 detrimental effect from yourself.

Name: Backup Drone
Description: Summons a drone that will follow the defensive target for 15 seconds. Gives the target a beneficial effect that increases the effectiveness of healing, leeching and barrier effects received by 30%. Every second the drone will heal the defensive target for Y.

Name: Advantage Me
Description: Whenever you critically hit you also gain a heal over time effect, healing for 10 every seconds for 5 seconds. Whenever you critically heal, you cleanse 1 detrimental effect from your defensive target. This can only happen once per target every 2 seconds.

Name: Sticky Drone
Description: Summons a drone that will follow you around for 40 seconds. You gain a beneficial effect that causes the next 2 attacks against you to backfire, causing the attacker to become Hindered and rooted to the ground for 4 seconds.

Name: Tough Luck
Description: Whenever you critically hit, you also cause the target to become Hindered and rooted to the ground for 4 seconds. This can only happen once every 30 seconds.

Name: Win-Win (ability)
Description: PBAoE: Affects you and up to 5 friends in a 15 metre radius around you. A PBAoE that heals for 55 and cleanses 2 detrimental effects.

Name: Contortionist
Description: Increases all heal. barrier, and leech effects by 10%. Also, whenever your are Hindered or Impaired, you will immediately remove all detrimental effects. This can only happen every 25 seconds.

Name: Greater Good
Description: Gives all group members a beneficial effect, which increases the effectiveness of all healing barriers and leeches done by 15% for 10 seconds. This ability does not trigger and is not affected by global recharge time.

Name: Utilitarianism
Description: Increases the duration of "Greater Good" by 5 seconds. Additionally, while "Greater Good" is active, all group members gain a heal over time effect that heals for 60 or 1.5% every second, whichever is larger. This value is not affected by your healing power or any other heal increasing effects.

Name: Health Drone
Description: Consumes all Pistol Resources. Summons a drone that will follow you for 7 seconds. While the drone will not heal you, it will heal allies every second for 16 - 26 with a Chain heal that can jump to up to 6 nearby friends in a 8 metre area around you. Heal scales based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Chain Feed
Description: Chain abilities are 10% more effective.

Name: Cleansing Drone
Description: Consumes all Pistol Resources. Summons a drone that will follow the target for 4 seconds. Every second it will attack the target dealing 19 - 37 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed, and cleanse 1 detrimental effect from up to 4 friends in a 5 metre area around the target. If the target is Hindered when the drone is summoned, it will instead cleanse 2 detrimental effects.

Name: Drone Support
Description: Heals all group members for 8 when "Cleansing Drone" attempts to cleanse. Targets cannot be Weakened for 2 seconds.

Name: Born Leader
Description: GTAoE: Affects up to 6 friends and 6 enemies in a 10 metre radius around the targeted point, pulsing every second for 5 seconds. A pulsing GTAoE attack that lasts 5 seconds. Up to 6 allies in the area are healed for 66 every second. Up to 6 enemies in a 10 metre radius will be dealt 60 physical damage. Affected targets also become Weakened by a single stack of the Corrupted effect, which reduces the effectiveness of heal, barrier and leech effects by 5% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

Name: Safety Off
Description: Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A single target Burst attack that hits 3 times, dealing 16 physical damage per hit.

Name: Extra Bullet
Description: "Safety Off" performs an additional hit that deals 7 physical damage.

Name: Fire at Will
Description: TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the target. Consumes all Assault Rifle Resources. A TAoE Frenzy ability that deals 35 physical damage. An additional hit is performed for each Assault Rifle Resource consumed, dealing 11 physical damage per hit.

Name: No Contest
Description: Whenever you apply Hindered, the next hit you perform cannot be evaded and you gain a beneficial effect which increases damage dealt by 10% for 8 seconds.

Name: Trigger Happy
Description: Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A single target attack that deals 49 physical damage. If the target is Hindered, it also becomes Afflicted with a damage over time effect that deals 3 physical damage every second for 5 seconds.

Name: Eagle Eye
Description: Increases direct damage and healing of Assault Rifle abilities by 10%.

Name: Slow the Advance
Description: GTAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the targeted point. A GTAoE that deals 279 physical damage. Affected targets also become Hindered and their movement speed is reduced by 70% for 8 seconds. Also places an area at the targeted point that lasts 8 seconds. Every second it will deal 10 physical damage to up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius. Susceptible to Anima Deviation.

Name: Military Code
Description: Whenever an enemy dies with your Assault Rifle Resources remaining, you gain a beneficial effect that causes your next Assault Rifle resource builder to build 2 additional Assault Rifle Resources.

Name: Anima Shot
Description: Builds 1 Assault Rifle Resource. A single target attack that deals 38 physical damage. You heal your defensive target for 27 and 7.1% of the damage dealt.

Name: Anima Boost
Description: Increases the damage dealt, leech, and heal of "Anima Shot" by 7.5%.

Name: Lock & Load
Description: Builds 3 Assault Rifle Resources. Reduces the recharge time of all Assault Rifle resource consumers currently recharging by 4 seconds. This ability does not trigger and is not affected by global recharge time.

Name: Extra Clip
Description: "Lock & Load" builds 2 additional Assault Rifle Resources.

Name: Fire in the Hole
Description: Consumes all Assault Rifle Resources. Sticks a spiked grenade to the target which deals 46 - 91 physical damage and then detonates 2 seconds later dealing 46 - 91 physical damage, based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Experience
Description: Increases the effectiveness of all leech effects by 20%.

Name: Three Round Burst
Description: Consumes all Assault Rifle Resources. A single target Burst attack that hits 3 times, dealing 30 - 60 physical damage per hit, based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Call Your Shots
Description: Whenever you hit, you gain a single stack of the Hit Rating effect, which increases your Hit Rating by 40 for 8 seconds per stack. The Hit Rating effect can stack up to 5 times. Whenever you glance, this effect is removed.

Name: Hip Fire
Description: Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A single target attack that deals 49 physical damage. This ability has a 10 metre range.

Name: Steady Hip Fire
Description: Increases the range of "Hip Fire" by 10 metres.

Name: Where it Hurts
Description: Consumes all Assault Rifle Resources. A single target attack that deals 90 - 182 physical damage, based on the number of resource consumed. If you hit an Afflicted target, the target becomes Hindered and its movement speed is reduced by 70% for 4 seconds.

Name: Short Controlled Bursts
Description: Increases Hit Rating for Burst attacks by 200. In addition, the Critical Chance and Penetration Chance of all Burst attacks is increased by 4%.

Name: Red Mist
Description: A single target attack that deals 439 physical damage. This attack cannot be evaded and will not glance. Applies Vulnerable to Magic.

Name: Lucky Bullet
Description: Whenever you hit, you build a Lucky Bullet counter. Once that counter reaches 6, your next attack causes the target to become Hindered and its movement speed is reduced by 70% for 8 seconds. This effect has an internal recharge time of 30 seconds.

Name: Tactical Retreat
Description: Column Dash: Dash backward 10 metres, affecting all enemies in a 6 metre wide column along the way. A column dash attack causing affected targets to become Hindered and reducing their movement speed by 70% for 4 seconds. A grenade is also left at the start location that affects up to 6 enemies, exploding 1.5 seconds after the dash, dealing 77 physical damage in an area around it causing affected targets to become Hindered, reducing their movement speed by 70% for 4 seconds.

Name: Lethality
Description: Whenever you hit, you gain a single stack of a beneficial effect that increases all damage dealt by 1.25% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 10 times. Whenever you glance, all stacks are removed.

Name: Razor Wire
Description: You place a 10 metre wide by 2 metre long area in front of you that lasts 10 seconds and dash backwards 10 metres. Any enemies passing through the area have their movement speed reduced by 30%.

Name: Explosives Expert
Description: Whenever you hit, you also apply an explosive charge to the target. This charge expodes after 3 seconds, dealing X physical damage.

Name: Incendiary Grenade
Description: TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around your target. A TAoE attack that deals 30 physical damage. Affected targets become Afflicted with a damage over time effect that deals 3 damage every second for 10 seconds.

Name: Demolition, Man
Description: Whenever you use a resource consuming ability, you also apply an explosive charge to the target. Charges can be applied to up to 6 enemies. This charge detonates after 3 seconds, dealing 94 physical damage if you are facing the target when the explosion occurs, or 125 physical damage and will not glance if you are facing away from the target when the explosion occurs. This effect has an internal recharge time of 5 seconds.

Name: Suppressing Fire
Description: Channelled: Every 0.25 seconds for 1 seconds. TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around your target. Builds 1 Resource on each affected enemy and one on self for secondary weapons. A channelled TAoE Frenzy attack that deals 20 physical damage on the first hit and 2 physical damage on each subsequent hit.

Name: Sharp Shooter
Description: Whenever you hit a target that is further than 12 metres from you, you also perform an additional hit dealing 7 physical damage to the target.

Name: Frag Grenade
Description: TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around your target. Consumes all Assault Rifle Resources. A TAoE attack that deals 45 - 90 physical damage. If you hit a Hindered target, an explosion centred around that target is triggered, dealing 9 - 18 physical damage. Damage scales based on the number of resources consumed.

Name: Shoot 'Em Up

If the target has the Blood Spike damage over time effect already, this ability instead deals 189 magical damage.

Name: Dark Potency
Description: Whenever you apply Afflicted, you gain a single stack of the Penetration Rating effect, which increases Penetration Rating by 40 per stack for 8 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

Name: Infection
Description: Chain: Jumps up to 5 metres 5 times, hitting up to 6 enemies. Consumes 3 Blood Resources. Can be powered by your own health. A Chain attack that deals 54 magical damage. Affected targets also become Afflicted with a damage over time effect dealing 7 magical damage every 2 seconds for 12 seconds. If an enemy dies while affected by this effect, it explodes, dealing 40 magical damage to nearby targets.

Name: Thicker Than Water
Description: Increases direct damage and healing of Blood abilities by 10%.

Name: Cardiac Arrest
Description: A single target attack that deals 348 magical damage. The target also becomes Impaired and unable to act for 3 seconds. Applies Vulnerable to Melee. Susceptible to Anima Deviation.

Name: Unholy Knowledge
Description: Increases damage dealt by damage over time effects by 10%.

Name: Blood Shield
Description: Builds 1 Blood Resource. Heals 27 and places an absorb barrier on your defensive target. This barrier absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 26 damage.

Name: Rapid Shield
Description: Increases the heal and barrier of "Blood Shield" by 7.5%.

Name: Angelic Aegis
Description: Consumes 3 Blood Resources. Can be powered by your own health. Heals 105 and places an absorb barrier on your defensive target. This barrier absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 104 damage.

Name: Angel's Touch
Description: "Angelic Aegis" heals for an additional 46 to targets below 50% health.

Name: Exsanguinate
Description: Channelled: Every 0.5 seconds for 2.5 seconds. Consumes 5 Blood Resources. Can be powered by your own health. A channelled Focus attack that deals 62 magical damage per hit. If the target is Impaired, it also becomes Afflicted with a damage over time effect that deals 6 magical damage every second for 10 seconds.

Name: Coagulation
Description: Increases the effectiveness of barrier effects by 60%.

Name: Bloodline
Description: Channelled: Every 0.25 seconds for 1 second. Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A channelled Focus attack that deals 12 magical damage per hit.

Name: Iron Maiden
Description: Whenever you penetrate a target that is Afflicted, you gain the Minor Pentration Chance effect, which increases Penetration Chance by 15% for 8 seconds.

Name: Left Hand of Darkness
Description: Consumes 3 Blood Resources. Can be powered by your own health. Causes the target to become Afflicted with a damage over time effect that deals 35 magical damage every second for 4 seconds. If you hit the target with this ability again while the effect is active, the target becomes Impaired and unable to act for 1 second. This ability will apply a 30 second recharge time when the stun is applied.

Name: Prolonged Darkness
Description: The "Left Hand of Darkness" damage over time effect lasts 2 seconds longer.

Name: Bloodshot
Description: Consumes 2 Blood Resources. Can be powered by your own health. A single target attack that deals 118 magical damage, or 130 magical damage if the target is Afflicted.

Name: Torture
Description: Whenever you finish channelling a Focus attack, you perform an extra hit that deals 8 magical damage to the target.

Name: Plague
Description: A single target attack that causes the target to become Afflicted with a damage over time effect that deals 66 magical damage every 2 seconds for 12 seconds. If the target dies while the Plague damage over time effect is active, enemies within 7 metres will become Afflicted with a new damage over time effect that deals 34 magical damage every 2 seconds for 8 seconds. Applies Vulnerable to Ranged.

Name: Vital Fluids
Description: Whenever you apply Afflicted, you have a 17.5% chance of build 1 resource for you primary weapon. If you already have the maximum available resources when this effect triggers, you will instead perform an additional hit dealing 21 magical damage to the target.

Name: Anaesthesia
Description: A single target attack that deals 91 magical damage and causes the target to become Impaired and unable to act for 5 seconds. This ability has a 3 metre range.

Name: Third Degree
Description: Whenever you penetrate, you build a Third Degree counter. When this counter reaches 3, you also cause the target to become Afflicted with a damage over time effect that deals 23 magical damage every second for 4 seconds.

Name: Contaminate
Description: A single target attack that causes the target to become Afflicted by a damage over time effect that deals 20 magical damage every second for 6 seconds. If the target is healed while this damage over time effect is active, it will perfrom a hit on the healer that deals 61 magical damage.

Name: Blood Bank
Description: Whenever you apply Afflicted, you gain a stack of the Blood Bank effect, which increases the damage dealt by your damage over time effects by 3% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

Name: Cannibalise
Description: Builds 3 Blood Resources. Deals 10% of your maximum health as magical damage to you and grants you a beneficial effect that causes your next Blood resource consumer to deal 20% more damage. This ability does not trigger and is not affected by global recharge time.

Name: Gross Anatomy
Description: Whenever one of your damage over time effects expires or is renewed, it will perform an additional hit that deals 21 magical damage.

Name: Open Vein
Description: Chain: Jumps up to 5 metres 5 times, hitting up to 6 enemies. Builds 1 resource for each equipped weapon. A Chain attack that deals 24 magical damage.

Name: Doom
Description: Whenever you penetrate, you gain a Doom counter. When this counter reaches 4, your next hit will penetrate.

Name: There Will Be Blood
Description: GTAoE: Affects 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the targeted point. Consumes 5 Blood Resources. Can be powered by your own health. A GTAoE attack that deals 54 magical damage. Also places an area on the ground lasting 6 seconds. This area deals 5 magical damage every second to enemies inside it, scaling with the number of targets originally hit.

Name: Splatter
Description: All your Chain attacks can jump to 2 additional targets.

Name: Guts and Glory
Description: TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the target. Consumes 3 Blood Resources. Can be powered by your own health. A TAoE attack that deals 71 magical damage. If any target is Impaired, you gain the Major Penetration Chance effect, which increases your Penetration Chance by 45% for 6 seconds.

Name: Circulation
Description: Whenever you apply Afflicted, you gain a heal over time effect that heals for 7 every second for 10 seconds. If the target is Impaired, the effect will also give you a barrier that absorbs 100% of incoming damage and  dissipates after absorbing 15 damage.

Name: Expulsion
Description: Places an absorb barrier on you that absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 246 damage. This barrier scales with Attack Rating and not with Heal Rating. When the barrier either expires or is spent, it will deal 314 magical damage to all enemies within 5 metres of you.

Name: Ruby Curtain
Description: Builds 1 Blood Resource. A single target heal that heals for 11 and places an absorb barrier on your defensive target. This barrier absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 42 damage.

Name: Donor
Description: Whenever you penetrate, you place a barrier on your defensive target. This barrier absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 15 damage.

Name: The Scarlet Arts
Description: Channelling: Every 0.4 seconds for 2 seconds. Consumes 5 Blood Resources. Can be powered by your own health. The first channelling hit places an absorb barrier on your defensive target, which absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 57. The next 3 channelling hits heal the defensive target for 58. The last channelling hit places the same barrier as the first hit.

Name: Culmination
Description: Whenever you finish channelling a Focus ability, you heal your defensive target for 9.

Name: Exquisite Corpse
Description: Consumes 2 Blood Resources. Can be powered by your own health. Places a reflect barrier on your defensive target, which reflects 50% of incoming damage back to the attacker and dissipates after reflecting 67 damage. Also heals the defensive target for 61.

Name: Sanguineous
Description: Whenever you place a barrier, you are healed for 12.

Name: My Bloody Valentine
Description: Places an absorb barrier on your defensive target, which absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 228 damage. While this barrier is active, the target is healed for 45 every second. When the barrier is removed it deals 226 damage in a 5 metre area around the target. If any enemies are hit by this, your defensive target gains a barrier that absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 152 damage.

Name: Omen
Description: Whenever you apply Impaired or whenever you are Impaired, you gain a beneficial effect that increases the amount of damage your next barrier can absorb by 100.

Name: Transfuse and Abuse
Description: Cleanses up to 3 damage over time effects active on you, and causes the target to become Afflicted with a damage over time effect that deals 9 magical damage every second per effect you cleansed for 7 seconds. This ability can only be activated when you are Afflicted.

Name: Five Times a Charm
Description: Whenever you penetrate, you build a Five Times a Charm counter. When this counter reaches 5, it will cause the target to become Impaired and unable to act for 3 seconds. This effect has a recharge time 30 seconds.

Name: Liquidation
Description: Places an area around the targeted point that will last for 10 seconds. Enemies inside the area become Afflicted with a damage over time effect that deals 14 magical damage and heals you for 7 every second for 4 seconds.

Name: Ebb and Flow
Description: Increases the power of your barriers by 20%, but reduces the power of your direct heals by 5%.

Name: Infusion
Description: Builds 3 Blood Resources. You remove your own barrier and gain a beneficial effect that will cause your next barrier to absorb 35% more damage. This ability can only be activated when you have a barrier. This ability does not trigger and is not affected by global recharge time.

Name: Clotting
Description: Whenever you apply a barrier to a target that already has a barrier, you also heal the target for 67% of the new barrier's strength.

Name: Hematic Rites
Description: TAoE: Affects up to 6 friends within a 5 metre radius around the defensive target. Consumes 2 Blood Resources. Can be powered by your own health. Places an absorb barrier on all affected targets, which absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 67 damage.

Name: Arterial Pulse
Description: Whenever you penetrate, you perform an additional hit on the target and enemies around it deals 14 magical damage.

Name: Linked Veins
Description: Chain: Jumps up to 5 metres 5 times, hitting up to 6 friends. Builds 1 Blood Resource. A Chain that heals for 13 and places a barrier that absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 13 damage. This effect does not apply to self.

Name: Last Rites
Description: Improves "Hermatic Rites" to deal 10 magical damage to nearby enemies if the barrier expire, or is depleted. "Hematic Rites" also now heals for 17 and places a barrier that absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 67 damage instead of its normal effect.

Name: Blood Pact
Description: PBAoE: Affects up to 6 friends in a 5 metre radius around you. Consumes 5 Blood Resources. Can be powered by your own health. Places and absorb barrier on affected targets that absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 78 damage. Affected targets are also given a beneficial effect that causes the first enemy to him them to become Impaired and unable to act for 3 seconds.

Name: Vessel Walls
Description: Whenever you activate a Chain ability, you gain an absorb barrier that absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 26 damage.

Name: Cold Blooded
Description: Channelled: Every 0.5 seconds for 2 seconds. You deal 3% of your maximum heal as magical damage to yourself. Each team member is heal for 67 per tick and receives and absorb barrier. This barrier absorbs 100% of incoming damage and dissipates after absorbing 66 damage. While you channel, you take 40% less damage.

Name: Provoke
Description: Taunts the target, causing it to gain enough hate towards you to start attacking you and forcing the target to attack you for 3 seconds.

Name: Agitator
Description: Increases the amount of hate enemies will gain towards you, making them more likely to attack you instead of others. Enemies will gain hate towards you at a 350% rate.

Name: Mass Provocation
Description: TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the target. A TAoE taunt that forces affected targets to attack you for 5 seconds.

Name: Fuel to the Fire
Description: Whenever you hit, the target generates 200 extra hate towards you.

Name: Mockingbird
Description: You gain a beneficial effect, which causes all hits against you during the next 10 seconds to also heal you for 9 and cause the attacker to gain 200 extra hate towards you.

Name: Resilient Defender
Description: Whenever you evade or block or an attack glances you, you are healed for 15.

Name: Stoicism
Description: You gain a beneficial effect that reduces the damage you take by 20% and causes enemies to gain hate against you at a 500% rate for 10 seconds. This ability does not trigger and is not affected by global recharge time.

Name: Confuse
Description: Reduces the amount of hate the target has towards you, making it more likely to attack other instead of you. The target's hate towards you is reduced by 50%.

Name: Subtlety
Description: Reduces the amount of hate enemies will gain towards you, making them more likely to attack others instead of you. Enemies will gain hate towards you at a 75% rate.

Name: Mass Confusion
Description: TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the target. A TAoE detaunt that reduces the amount of hate affected targets have towards you, making them more likely to attack others instead of you. The target's hate towards you is reduced by 33%.

Name: Under the Radar
Description: Whenever you critically hit or penetrate, you also make the target more likely to attack others instead of you by reducing its hate towards you by 400.

Name: Misdirection
Description: For the next 8 seconds, 50% of the hate enemies gain towards you is instead transfered as hate towards your defensive target.

Name: Kill Streak
Description: Whenever you or a member of your group kills an enemy, you gain 1 stack of a beneficial effect that increases the damage you deal by 3% per stack for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

Name: Do or Die
Description: Increases the direct damage you deal by 25% for 10 seconds. This ability does not trigger and is not affected by global recharge time.

Name: Sleight of Hand
Description: Removes all active crowd control effects from you and makes you immune to further crowd control effect for 7 seconds. This ability does not trigger global recharge time.

Name: Unfair Advantage
Description: Increases the effectiveness of healing received by 5%.

Name: Turn the Tables
Description: A self heal that heals for 642. This value is not affected by your healing power or and other heal increasing effects.

Name: Cannonball
Description: Whenever you activate a movement ability, you also gain the Minor Ward effect, which reduces all damage received by 7.5% for 8 seconds.

Name: Speed Freak
Description: Increases your movement speed by 25% for 6 seconds. Cleanses Hindered and prevents you from being Hindered for the duration.

Name: Tenacity
Description: Whenever you become Impaired or Hindered, you gain a heal over time effect that heals you for 26 every second for 5 seconds.

Name: Last Resort
Description: You become unable to act for 8 seconds. During this period you are invulnerablt and are healed for 200 every second. This value is not affected by your healing power or any other heal increasing effects. You also gain the Minor Ward effect, which reduces all damage received by 7.5% for 8 seconds when the invulnerability effect ends. This ability does not trigger and is not affected by global recharge time.

Name: Crack
Description: A column attack that deals 152 physical damage. Column: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 3 metre wide by 5 metre long area in front of you.

Name: Jones in the Fast Lane
Description: Reduces the recharge time of Whip abilities by 50%.

Name: Whip It Good
Description: A channeled cone attack that deals 40 physical damage per hit. Channeled: Every 0.4 seconds for 2 seconds. Cone: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre long 120 degree

Name: Sonic Boom
Description: Whenever you hit a target with a Whip ability, you perform an additional hit on the target and up to 4 enemies within 3 metres around it that deals 9 physical damage. Activating "Giddy Up" causes the above effect to be triggered around you.

Name: Giddy Up
Description: A PBAoE that gives affected targets a beneficial effect, which increases their movements speed by 15% for 6 seconds. PBAoE: Affects you and up to 4 friends in a 10 metre radius around you.

Name: Whiplash
Description: Whenever you hit a target with a Whip ability, you apply a detrimental effect which reduces the Physical and Magical Protection of the target by 200 for 7 seconds. Activating "Giddy Up" also applies the detrimental effect to 6 enemies around you.

Name: Whippersnapper
Description: A column attack that deals 204 physical damage to the nearest enemy. Pulls the target towards you. Column: Affects the nearest enemy in a 3 metre wide by 5 metre long area in front of you.

Name: Timber
Description: A single target attack that deals 226 physical damage.

Name: Revved Up
Description: Increases the damage dealt by "Rotting Teeth" by 100%.

Name: Hurly-Burly
Description: A channelled PBAoE attack that deals 44 physical damage. Channelled: Every 0.5 seconds for 2.5 seconds. PBAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around you.

Name: No Love Lost
Description: Improves "Rotting Teeth" to generate 263 more hate each time it deals damage.

Name: Diamond Grit
Description: Places a reflect barrier on you that reflects 50% of incoming damage back to the attacker and dissipates after reflecting 493 damage or after 10 seconds. The magnitude of the barrier scales based on the Weapon Power of your Chainsaw.

Name: Degradation
Description: Increases the heal required to remove "Rotting Teeth" by 650.

Name: The Carver's Art
Description: A channelled attack that deals 12 physical damage per hit. Both you and the target are rooted to the ground while this ability is active. Channelled: Every 0.2 seconds for 3 second.

Name: Vector-Space
Description: Vector: A single target attack that deals 57 magical damage and also applies a damage over time effect that deals 12 magical damage every second for 6 seconds. Becomes "Space" after a successful hit. Space: If the target does not have the "Vector" damage over time effect, this is a single target attacks that deals 152 magical damage. If the target has the "Vector" damage over time effect, this attack instead affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the target, dealing 152 magical damage. Becomes "Vector" after a successful activation or 5 seconds have passed.

Name: Supersymmetry
Description: Whenever you hit a target that has 50% or more of their maximum health remaining with a Quantum ability, you will perform an additional hit that deals 24 magical damage.

Name: Collider-Collapse
Description: Collider: A channelled attack against the closest target in a straight line in front of you that deals 36 magical damage per hit every 0.25 seconds for 2.5 seconds. Each time you hit you gain a single stack of "Collider" counters. Becomes "Collapse" if you have gained at least one "Collider" counter by the end of the channel. Collapse: A single target attack that deals 32 magical damage for each "Collider" counter you have up to a maximum 324 magical damage. Becomes "Collider" after a successful activation or 5 seconds have passed.

Name: Energy Transfer
Description: Increases the effectiveness of "Space", "Collapse", "Destiny", and "Oblivion" by 25%. Reduces the effectiveness of "Vector", "Collider", "Charge", "Polestar" by 20%

Name: Charge-Density
Description: Charge: Gives a friend a heal over time effect that heals for 35 every second for 6 seconds. Become "Destiny" after a successful activation. Density: A heal that affects up to 6 friends in a 5 metre radius around the target, healing for 126. If the defensive target has your "Charge" heal over time effect, you also leave a 5 metre radius persistent ground area around the target for 5 seconds. Every second up to 6 friends in the area area healed for 6. Becomes "Charge" after a successful activation or 5 seconds have passed.

Name: Probability Rules
Description: Whenever you activate a Quantum ability, there is a 20% chance that its recharge does not trigger.

Name: Polestar-Oblivion
Description: Polestar: An attack that affects up to 2 enemies in a 1 metre radius around the targeted point, dealing 106 magical damage. Affected targets also receive the "Polestar" effect for 5 seconds. Becomes "Oblivion" after a successful hit. Oblivion: A cone attack that affects up to 6 enemies in a 7 metre long 120 degree cone in front of you, dealing 145 magical damage. Affected targets that have the "Polestar" effect become Impaired and unable to act for 2 seconds. Becomes "Polestar" after a successful activation or 5 seconds have passed.

Name: Dragon's Breath
Description: A channelled cone attack that deals 40 physical damage per hit. Channelled: Every 0.4 seconds for 2 seconds. Cone: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 15 metre long 60 degree cone in front of you.

Name: Searing Magnesium
Description: Increases direct damage dealt by Flamethrower abilities by 15%.

Name: Scorched Earth
Description: Creates a wall of fire which extends 2 metres forward and 4 metres to either side of the targeted location and lasts 6 seconds. Every 0.3 seconds it will hit up to 6 enemies in the area dealing 19 physical damage.

Name: Assiduous Burn
Description: Increases the duration of "Incendiary Expertise" to 10 seconds. Also, whenever "Incendiary Expertise" deals damage, all Flamethrower ability recharge times are reduced by 5% of their remaining recharge time.

Name: Smells Like Victory-Fire it Up
Description: Smells Like Victory: An attack that affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around the targeted point, dealing 15 physical damage. Affected targets also receive the "Smells Like Victory" effect for 3 seconds. increasing damage taken by 2%. Becomes "Fire It Up" after a successful hit. Fire It Up: An attack that deals 113 physical damage. If the affected target has the "Smells Like Victory" effect, the attack instead deals 226 physical damage. Becomes "Smells Like Victory" after a successful activation or 5 seconds have passed.

Name: Viscous Accelerant
Description: Whenever you hit with a Flamethrower ability, the target has its movement speed reduced by 20% for 6 seconds.

Name: Cremate
Description: A single target attack that deals 7 physical damage and 21 physical damage every second for 10 seconds. The target also becomes rooted to the ground for 2 seconds.

Name: Pop Shot
Description: A TAoE attack that deals 152 physical damage. TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around your target.

Name: Rangefinder
Description: Increases the attack range of all Rocket Launcher abilities by 5 metres.

Name: Clusterstruck
Description: A GTAoE attack that deals 175 physical damage. GTAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre redius around the targeted point.

Name: Rocket Science
Description: Reduces the recharge time of Rocket Launcher abilities by 50%.

Name: Death From Above
Description: You rocket jump 15 metres forward hitting up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius where you take off and where you land, dealing 100 physical damage. Deals 9% of your maximum health as damage to you when activated.

Name: Warhead
Description: Increases direct damage dealt by Rocket Launcher abilities by 15%.

Name: Big Red Button
Description: A TAoE attack that deals 198 physical damage. TAoE: Affects up to 6 enemies in a 5 metre radius around your target.
